# Breakthrough in the Desert 2026

> A three-day live transformational experience in the Sonoran desert for adults 40+ who are ready to step into the most inspired chapter of their lives. Hosted by Dr. Anthony Balduzzi of The Fit Father Project & The Fit Mother Project.

## Event Details

- **Event Name:** Breakthrough in the Desert (formerly Fit Father & Fit Mother LIVE)
- **Dates:** August 7-9, 2026
- **Location:** Arizona Grand Resort & Spa, 8000 South Arizona Grand Parkway, Phoenix, AZ 85044
- **Capacity:** 150 attendees (intimate, intentional)
- **Audience:** Adults 40+ seeking transformation in body, relationships, purpose
- **Format:** In-person, three days, multi-track (keynotes, breakouts, somatic work, ceremony)

## Pricing

- **GA+ Ticket:** $845 early bird (through Father's Day, June 21, 2026), $995 standard
- **VIP Ticket:** $1,295 early bird, $1,495 standard. Includes front-row, daily lunches with faculty, VIP Q&A, both 2025 and 2026 event recordings.
- **Partner add-on:** +$595 GA+, +$895 VIP
- **Payment plan:** 3-pay installment available at checkout, no interest

## Faculty (2026)

1. **Dr. Anthony Balduzzi** — Host. Naturopathic physician, founder of FFP/FMP serving 70,000+ members in 100+ countries.
2. **Dr. Jamil Sayegh** — Naturopathic physician, transformation coach. Leads the "Wake Up" keynote and the integration workshop on Day 3.
3. **Dr. Amie Hornaman** — "The Thyroid-Fixer." Thyroid, hormones, and the hidden drivers of midlife fatigue.
4. **Maraya Brown** — CNM, MSN. Reclaiming aliveness, intimacy, and the spark in long-term relationships.
5. **Dr. Philip Ovadia** — Board-certified cardiac surgeon. Metabolic truths about heart health.
6. **Caroline Alan** — CEO of BEAM Minerals. The cellular mineral reset.
7. **Luana Marzluff** — Founder of KAKAO. Sunday morning ceremonial cacao ceremony.
8. **John Salisbury** — Master yoga instructor at Modern Yoga Scottsdale. Saturday sunrise yoga.

## Day-by-Day Arc

- **Friday (Wake Up):** See the patterns. Name what's been draining you. Anthony's Intentional Living keynote. Movement breakouts. Health Q&A panel. Evening Kava happy hour.
- **Saturday (Come Alive):** Sunrise yoga with John Salisbury. Dr. Jamil's Wake Up keynote. Somatic breathwork. Dr. Amie on thyroid + hormones. Dr. Philip on heart health. Maraya Brown's evening keynote on intimacy. Sunset pool party.
- **Sunday (Walk Through):** Cold plunge. Luana's cacao ceremony. Dr. Jamil's integration workshop (most attendees call this the moment everything shifted). Closing keynote with Dr. Anthony.

## What Attendees Get

- 3 days of keynotes, workshops, and main-stage sessions
- All experiential breakouts (workouts, breathwork, somatic practices, yoga, cold plunge)
- 3 connection lunches (real food, no seed oils)
- Curated vendor hall with leading-edge health brands
- 2025 Live Event recordings (GA+); 2025 AND 2026 recordings (VIP)
- VIP-only: front-row seating, daily lunch with Anthony + faculty, VIP-only Q&A with Anthony, VIP lounge

## Logistics

- **Airport:** Phoenix Sky Harbor International (PHX), 10 minutes from venue
- **Lodging:** Discounted Breakthrough rate ~$150/night at Arizona Grand Resort. Every room is a full suite. Booking on attendee.
- **Climate:** Arizona dry heat in August. All sessions are indoor + air-conditioned. 7-acre water park, lazy river, and pools on property.
- **Family-friendly:** Conference sessions are 15+, but the resort itself is paradise for all ages.

## Refund Policy

Tickets are non-refundable but fully transferable up to July 1, 2026. Transfer to anyone at no additional cost — email the team.

## Contact

- Email: support@fitfatherproject.com
- SMS: 602-999-0004

## Tagline

> Three Days. One Doorway. The Rest of Your Life.
> Health is the doorway. Aliveness is the room.
